heroSubtitle: We're here to help. Find resources, schedule appointments, and get the answers you need.
beforeYourVisit: Arrive 10-15 minutes early to check in
Bring your insurance card and photo ID
Bring a list of current medications
Bring recent medical records if available
whatToExpectBody1: Our clinical staff will conduct a brief evaluation, take vital signs, and review your medical history. Your physician will then spend time with you to discuss your symptoms, perform an exam, and develop a personalized care plan.
whatToExpectBody2: We're committed to providing compassionate, evidence-based care in a comfortable and professional environment.

resources.title: Online Bill Payment
resources.description: Pay your medical bills securely online.

resources.title: Patient Portal - Epic MyChart
resources.description: Access your medical records, test results, and communicate with your care team.

resources.title: Request Medical Records (Patients)
resources.description: Request copies of your medical records through our records partner, MediCopy.

resources.title: Request Medical Records (Third Party Requesters)
resources.description: For attorneys, insurers, and other third-party requesters submitting records requests through MediCopy.

resources.title: Instructional Videos
resources.description: Step-by-step video guides for using inhalers and nebulizers correctly.

resources.title: Notice of Privacy Practices
resources.description: Review our HIPAA privacy practices and your patient rights.

resources.title: Current Billing (7/1/2018 - Present)
resources.description: Information about recent billing and payment options.

resources.title: Prior Billing (Before 7/1/2018)
resources.description: Historical billing information available upon request.

resources.title: Insurance Coverage
resources.description: We accept most major insurance plans. Please contact your insurance company to verify coverage.

ctaBody: Use our online scheduling system or call us today to book your appointment with one of our specialists.
